commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Telegram channel-message preview flow tooling and changes reasoning/progress preview labels, animation, formatting, and detection across Telegram, Discord, Feishu, heartbeat, SDK docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/UX PR rather than a reported current-main bug. The relevant verification question is after-patch behavior proof for the visible Telegram preview/final flow.
commands.review_followup: This PR needs maintainer/product review plus live Telegram proof, not an automated repair branch, because no narrow source defect was found.

target.title: Add Telegram progress preview flows
target.body:
## Summary
- add a generic dev channel-message flow runner with Telegram support and `thinking-final` / `working-final` preview flows
- rename user-facing reasoning/progress labels to `Thinking` and `Working`, including animated 2s ellipsis updates and blank-line-separated progress details
- tighten formatted reasoning detection so visible `Thinking...` replies are not swallowed, with Discord/Feishu/Telegram parser follow-through

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts test/scripts/channel-message-flows.test.ts src/infra/heartbeat-runner.returns-default-unset.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-utils.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/reasoning-lane-coordinator.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/reply-payload.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts extensions/discord/src/chunk.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Telegram progress previews can be locally exercised with flow fixtures, and progress/reasoning labels now render as `Working` / `Thinking` with animated ellipses.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout using the repo Vitest wrapper and autoreview.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts test/scripts/channel-message-flows.test.ts src/infra/heartbeat-runner.returns-default-unset.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-utils.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/reasoning-lane-coordinator.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/reply-payload.test.ts src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts extensions/discord/src/chunk.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: Targeted touched-surface test run passed 12 files / 508 tests; autoreview reported `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.
Observed result after fix: The dev flow runner supports Telegram `thinking-final` and `working-final`, progress labels animate at the safer 2s cadence, and formatted reasoning filters no longer treat visible `Thinking...` answers as hidden reasoning.
What was not tested: No live Telegram network send was rerun after the final parser/timer cleanup; earlier local previews drove the UX iteration.
target.author: patrick-erichsen
